title: How scientists ask microbes questions
summary: Pathways through microbiology — what makes a question testable; how observation + patience build evidence; how research mistakes (Marshall self-inoculation for H. pylori) become the patient observation that pays off. Anti-credentialism register per CQ CONTENT_STYLE_GUIDE.md § 4.5: foreground the doing-the-work side, NEVER hero-myth lexicon. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase4Kits().

questions.prompt: Reviewer-signoff pending — Phase 4 microbiome-research kit question placeholder.
questions.explanation: Reviewer-signoff pending — questions ship in a future round once anti-credentialism review completes per ADR-016 + .claude/rules/trauma-informed-content.md.
